status: public readiness gate, not an application

official_facts.checked_fact: The 2026 call was opened on 15 June 2026.
official_facts.readiness_meaning: The call is live and can be tracked, but live status does not create fit or authority.

official_facts.checked_fact: The official page lists application intake from 15 June 2026 to 18 September 2026.
official_facts.readiness_meaning: There is time for route owner replies and consortium evidence before any formal move.

official_facts.checked_fact: The official page lists pre registration completion by 14 September 2026 at 17:30.
official_facts.readiness_meaning: A private decision deadline exists before the final application window.

official_facts.checked_fact: The official page lists smart education technologies as one of five priority areas and does not list health as a direct priority area.
official_facts.readiness_meaning: Any possible route must be treated as education adjacent, not a direct health priority claim.

official_facts.checked_fact: The support page says applications without a consortium are not evaluated.
official_facts.readiness_meaning: No single person public portfolio can be described as application ready.

official_facts.checked_fact: The support page describes a customer organization, a technology provider company, an experienced research route, and TÜBİTAK Yapay Zekâ Enstitüsü in the model.
official_facts.readiness_meaning: Readiness requires evidence for all route roles before any public or private application language.

readiness_gates.needed_evidence: A real organization says clinician AI literacy or health AI safety education is an actual demand.
readiness_gates.current_state: No route owner has replied with demand side fit.

readiness_gates.needed_evidence: A provider route owner says the topic is in scope as smart education technology.
readiness_gates.current_state: No provider route owner reply exists.

readiness_gates.needed_evidence: A university lab, center, public research center, or institute route gives substantive research fit feedback.
readiness_gates.current_state: Only one Hacettepe acknowledgement exists, with no substantive research commitment.

readiness_gates.needed_evidence: A confirmed consortium has reason to approach TÜBİTAK Yapay Zekâ Enstitüsü.
readiness_gates.public_action: Do not request a meeting or intent declaration.

readiness_gates.needed_evidence: Goktug confirms authority, time, role, budget boundary, terms boundary, and whether any formal move is allowed.
readiness_gates.current_state: No clearance for application, partner, budget, terms, or formal route action.

gmail_check.result: Prior Hacettepe health informatics acknowledgement only. No new route owner reply.

next_action: Wait for a real route owner reply or build a private decision note for Goktug. Do not submit, request YZE contact, or claim a consortium.
